one_time_description: Surrender claim revenue of $4,647,542 received in 2021 (vs $403,636 in 2020), likely a land surrender settlement
economic_notes: Nation has business entities including Waywayseecappo Construction Corporation, Waywayseecappo Elton Gas Bar Corporation, Waywayseecappo Development Corporation, Waywayseecappo Gas Bar, and KRW limited partnership. Video lottery terminals and Waywayseecappo Wolverines also mentioned as revenue sources.
notes: Consolidated entity includes 5 departments (Operations, Education Authority, Training, Medical, Social Services) and 5 GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Large accounts payable jump from $4.3M to $23.4M and term loans subject to refinancing of $36.48M added in current year are unusual. Notes receivable of $20M appeared in 2021 with no prior year balance. Accounts receivable dropped significantly from $26.9M to $5.9M. Waywayseecappo 1874 settlement trust receivable dropped from $25.2M to near zero, suggesting settlement receipt. Annual debt service figure represents repayment of long-term debt only. Transfer to Nation business entity of $1,000,000 deducted before deficit. total_government_transfers includes ISC $27,396,804 + CMHC $870,582 + First Peoples Development $548,378 + Assembly of Manitoba Chiefs $27,709 = $28,843,473; osr calculated as total revenue minus government transfers.
